label: Founder-led service businesses
pains: The buyer wants proof, examples and a transparent mechanism because they have already wasted money on agencies.
desired_outcomes: The buyer wants proof, examples and a transparent mechanism because they have already wasted money on agencies.
A founder says agencies sound polished but never explain the service clearly enough for buyers to trust it.
"I do not want another agency that hides behind reports."
"I need to know exactly what will be done before I trust the process."
common_objections: A founder says agencies sound polished but never explain the service clearly enough for buyers to trust it.
"I do not want another agency that hides behind reports."
trust_signals: The buyer wants proof, examples and a transparent mechanism because they have already wasted money on agencies.
"Show me the process, not just the promise."
supporting_quotes: "Show me the process, not just the promise."
"I do not want another agency that hides behind reports."
"I need to know exactly what will be done before I trust the process."
"I want qualified calls, not vanity leads."
